corrections.location: between Swete v.24 and v.25 (before 'καὶ μὴ προβῇ')
corrections.note: Spurious '29' verse marker inserted between v.24 and v.25; the apparatus on this page only treats verses 17–25, and verse 29 cannot stand between 24 and 25.

uncertain.location: v.19, 'ὅτι ἡ πόλις ἣν ἐκείνη ἀποστάτις'
uncertain.note: 'ἣν' may actually be 'ἦν' (imperfect of εἰμί) — grammatically expected reading is 'ἡ πόλις ἦν ἐκείνη ἀποστάτις'; print is small, please verify diacritics.

uncertain.location: v.22, 'τὴν ἐπιστολήν ἣν πέμψατε πρὸς μέ'
uncertain.note: 'πέμψατε' may be 'ἐπέμψατε' (missing augment ε-); 'you sent' is the expected sense (Brenton: 'the letter that ye sent').

uncertain.location: Apparatus v.18 'το τουτο] το το A'
uncertain.note: Body reads 'τὸ τοιοῦτο'; apparatus lemma may actually print 'το τοιουτο' (missing 'οι').
Body reads 'εὑρέθη'; entry likely should be 'ευρεθη] ηυρεθη A' (lemma left of bracket appears missing).
Body in this region has 'ἐπεὶ ἐνεργεῖται'; apparatus lemma may actually be 'ἐπει' / 'ἐπεὶ' rather than 'ἐπι'.
'λ' could plausibly be a mis-decode of the Sinaiticus siglum ℵ; please verify the letter shape.

notes: Verse-number sequence in body is non-monotonic (18, 20, 21, 19, 23, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 29, 25). Swete prints editorial verse numbers reflecting MS reordering; most are likely correct, but the lone '29' is anomalous.
